title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: UAF in ValueSerializer::WriteRawBytes
bounty_rationale: V8 Sandbox Bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
Injecting faults in the `stack` property of a `URIError` object causes a UAF. The root cause seems to be in `ExpandBuffer` at `src/objects/value-serializer.cc:408`. If `base::Realloc` is called with `requested_capacity = 0`, `buffer_` is freed and `new_buffer` is set to nu
